heading: Today
text: Some early showers east of the Green Mountains ending.  Intervals of clouds and sun, with a stray mountain shower, and more sun in northern valleys and south.  Much cooler, and less humid.  Highs in the 60s to low 70s.  Winds northwest, becoming west 10 to 15 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph east of the Green Mountains.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy and cool.  Lows in the upper 40s to mid 50s.  Winds west near 10 mph, becoming light and variable east, and turning to the south near 10 mph west of the Green Mountains.

heading: Tuesday
text: Mostly sunny.  Highs in the 70s, near 70 over the higher terrain north.  Winds light and variable, becoming south near 10 mph west of the Green Mountains.
